chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6859 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 14-04-2025 None present. This petition is pending since 2019 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
